title: DrAyri Totem (DrDonut)
description: Totem of DrDonut with custom sound
body:
### **_THIS MOD WILL NO LONGER RECEIVE UPDATES_**



**DrDonut Totem Resourcepack**
Carry raw emotion—replace your Totem of Undying with DrDonut’s viral “meow meow” moment.
This resourcepack transforms the vanilla totem into a grayscale Speed model with a solemn expression, capturing the vulnerability behind one of his most unexpected livestream confessions.

-  🎭 **_Features_**
1. ✅ Replaces Totem of Undying with Donuts’s face 🧩 Compatible with vanilla gameplay and datapacks
2. 🔁 Modular asset structure for easy editing and streamer swaps
3. 🛠️ Works with Minecraft 1.20+
4. Join Our [Discord](https://discord.gg/d96gFRrRRX) for Support
